task_completion.description: Open the initial dual_parachute_deployment.ork design in OpenRocket.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenRocket GUI is visible with the 'Dual parachute deployment' rocket loaded in the component tree.

task_completion.description: Modify the fins to a Through-The-Wall (TTW) configuration with the specified tab dimensions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A fin configuration dialog is open on the 'Fin tabs' section, showing TTW tabs enabled with a Tab length of at least 100 mm and a Tab height of at least 20 mm.

task_completion.description: Add two plywood centering rings named 'Forward Fin Ring' and 'Aft Fin Ring' to the booster body tube.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenRocket component tree shows two new inner tube components named 'Forward Fin Ring' and 'Aft Fin Ring' placed inside the booster body tube. The material should be visible as plywood in their configuration dialogs.

task_completion.description: Upgrade the propulsion system by assigning an AeroTech J350W motor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Motors & Configuration' tab in OpenRocket shows the AeroTech J350W (or J350) motor assigned to the rocket's motor mount.

task_completion.description: Run a flight simulation to verify structural limits with the new motor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Flight simulations' tab in OpenRocket shows a completed simulation run for the new configuration, displaying calculated values for Maximum Velocity and Maximum Acceleration.

task_completion.description: Write a structural upgrade report containing the required specifications and simulation results.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal is visible showing the contents of '/home/ga/Documents/exports/ttw_upgrade_report.txt'. The text must include the fin tab dimensions (>=100mm length, >=20mm height), confirmation of the plywood centering rings, the J350W motor, and the simulated Max Velocity and Max Acceleration.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenRocket GUI to modify the design rather than directly editing the .ork XML file in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with OpenRocket dialog boxes, component trees, and configuration tabs.

integrity.description: The simulation results in the text report match the actual simulation run in OpenRocket.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Max Velocity and Max Acceleration values written in the text report exactly match or closely correspond to the values visible in the OpenRocket 'Flight simulations' tab.

integrity.description: The agent actively created and saved the report file using a text editor or terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a text editor (e.g., gedit, nano) or terminal echo/cat commands being used to author the report at the correct path, rather than the file magically appearing.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target save path for the modified rocket is '/home/ga/Documents/rockets/ttw_fin_upgrade.ork'. The report must be saved to '/home/ga/Documents/exports/ttw_upgrade_report.txt'. The fin tabs must have a minimum length of 100 mm (0.1m) and a minimum height of 20 mm (0.02m). The assigned motor must be an AeroTech J350W (or contain 'J350'). The passing threshold for the automated script is 60 points.
